title: QUANTUM PARTICLE ON A QUANTUM CIRCLE
author_string: BRZEZIŃSKI, TOMASZ, REMBIELIŃSKI, JAKUB, SMOLIŃSKI, KORDIAN A.
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: We describe a q-deformed dynamical system corresponding to the quantum free particle moving along the circle. The algebra of the observables is constructed and discussed. We construct and classify irreducible representations of the system.
